message:
🐛 Hoist useMissions mock spies for referential stability (#2199)

Move vi.fn() instances out of the useMissions mock factory into
top-level constants so each render gets the same spy references.
Prevents unnecessary rerenders and enables future call assertions.

Addresses Copilot review feedback on PR #2198.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
